# RocketOpp Marketplace — AI App Marketplace with Lease-to-Own

> The first AI software marketplace with lease-to-own pricing. Buy outright, subscribe, or lease — eventually own. HIPAA Tier 4 audit reports. AI assessment. Full-service consultation.

**Product:** RocketOpp Marketplace (rocketopp.com)
**Vendor:** RocketOpp LLC
**Tagline:** "AI software, your way. Buy. Subscribe. Lease-to-own."

## What it does

RocketOpp Marketplace is the AI app distribution layer for RocketOpp LLC's product suite + third-party AI applications.

### Three purchase models (industry first)
- **Buy outright** — One-time payment, lifetime access
- **Subscribe** — Monthly recurring, cancel anytime
- **Lease-to-own** — Monthly payments → eventual ownership (12, 24, or 36 month terms). Industry-first model for AI software.

### Featured product lines

#### HIPAA 2026 Audit Reports — Tier 4 live
- Tier 1: AI Readiness Report — $149
- Tier 2: Full Compliance Report — $399
- Tier 3: Premium Audit + Booking — $499
- Tier 4: Full Concierge + Live Walkthrough — $899

Magic-link auth for report access. Domain-locked report URLs. Generated by 0nCore HIPAA Scanner v2 (63 checks).

#### AI Assessment + Consultation
- /ai-assessment — Free AI readiness questionnaire
- /consultation — Strategy call booking
- /pitch-idea — Submit a custom AI app idea
- /request-app — Request from existing catalog

#### Service marketplace
12 service landing pages (SXO, AI automation, AI applications, web design, conversion optimization, content marketing, PPC, etc.)

#### Marketplace catalog
- /marketplace — Full app browser
- /marketplace/lease-to-own — Filter to L2O-eligible apps
- /marketplace/[slug] — Per-app sales page (SXO-optimized, schema.org Product JSON-LD)

## Stack

Next.js 16 · React 19 · Supabase (`rtwtaisjtvdajrdyivkn`) · Anthropic Claude + Groq (production) · Stripe · Tailwind v4

## Important Pages (60+ public)

### Tier 1 (Landing)
- /, /health-check, /marketplace, /rocket-mcp, /services

### Tier 2 (Conversion)
- /ai-assessment, /pitch-idea, /request-app
- /hipaa, /hipaa/order
- /gtm, /gtm/book

### Tier 3 (SEO Service Pages)
12 deep service landings (see /services/* in sitemap)

### Tier 4 (Content)
- /blog, /blog/[slug]
- /clients/ecospray (case studies)

### Auth
- /login, /register
